name: revit_create_and_print_sheets_batch
description: Batch-processes selected HVAC fabrication duct parts: for each matching product code, creates a sheet with right, front, top, and isometric views, exports PDF and JPG, then rolls back the transaction so nothing is committed.

element_ids.description: FabricationPart element ids; when omitted, uses pre-selection or interactive pick

product_codes.description: Fabrication product codes to process (defaults to built-in list in Command)

output_directory.description: Directory for PDF and image export (default C:/tmp)

notes: Requires fabrication ductwork with matching product codes and title block 'AIR CRO - Plano DIN A4'. Uses DialogBoxShowing to auto-accept temporary hide/isolate export prompt. Each part is processed in a rolled-back transaction.
